description_long: This is a modern, freestanding cabinet with a combination of light wood and matte white finishes. The cabinet features three tall vertical doors on the front, with a smaller compartment on the upper right and an open shelf area on the left. The interior of the open shelf is lined with wood, and a single blue-gray shelf is visible inside. The sides and back of the cabinet are finished in a light wood texture, while the front panels are smooth and white. The cabinet stands on small, barely visible feet, elevating it slightly off the ground. Its clean lines and minimalist design make it suitable for urban environments such as lobbies, offices, or apartment entryways.
description: A modern, freestanding cabinet with light wood sides, matte white doors, and an open shelf with a blue-gray interior. It features three tall doors, a smaller upper compartment, and a minimalist design.
description_view_0: The left side of the cabinet, showing the light wood finish and the full height of the unit.
description_view_1: The front view, displaying three tall white doors, a smaller upper compartment, and an open shelf with a blue-gray base.
description_view_2: The right side of the cabinet, featuring a plain white panel with no visible openings or features.
description_view_3: The back view, showing the light wood paneling on the right and the white panels covering most of the surface.
